Sign-in gate. Reads optional user and next search param; redirects authenticated users to next path; otherwise renders email/password AccessForm with guest link to choose-product and decorative architectural panel.

Legacy URL; immediately redirects to /downloads.
Product suite chooser. Unauthenticated users without guest mode redirect to /access; passes guestMode and authenticated flags to ChooseProductPage for Planner vs other tools entry.
Product comparison. Parses ?items= comma-separated product URL keys; loads each product from catalog via getProductByUrlKey; renders side-by-side spec rows with links to PDP and quote actions.
Contact form page. Passes intent and source query params (e.g. quote-cart) into ContactPageView for pre-filled context and tracking.
Authenticated workspace dashboard. Requires user via getOptionalUser; unauthenticated redirect to /access?next=/dashboard; shows DashboardClient with user email.
Legacy URL; immediately redirects to /downloads.

Project photo gallery from static GALLERY_PROJECTS data in a masonry grid with hero and contact teaser.

Workspace login. Redirects signed-in users to sanitized next path; otherwise SuiteLoginPage with links to guest mode and product chooser.

Single plan viewer for signed-in user. Loads plan document by id and userId via loadPlannerDocumentFromStore; renders PortalPlanPageView.
Redirects unauthenticated portal visitors to /access?next=/portal.
Redirects guest plan view attempts to /access with next=/portal/{id}.
Authenticated planner portal list. requireAuthUser loads user's saved plans from planner store when DB configured; PortalPageView shows plan list and database status.
Portfolio gallery. Server reads public/images/projects/{folder} per client; filters clients with 2+ photos; renders image grid from filesystem + PORTFOLIO_CLIENTS data.

how_it_works: Privacy policy with structured sections from LEGAL_PAGE_COPY and contact details.
Product detail page (PDP). Resolves product by URL key from Supabase; merges images specs variants; generateMetadata and breadcrumb JSON-LD; ProductViewer for 3D gallery and quote cart actions.
Category listing page. Normalizes category slug; 404 or canonical redirect; fetches catalog from Supabase for SSG paths; CategoryPageView renders filterable product grid.
Legacy category URL alias. Normalizes slug to canonical category id and reuses CategoryPageView (same as /products/[category]).
Product catalog hub. CategoryGrid lists all product categories; JSON-LD CollectionPage; static metadata from PRODUCTS_PAGE_COPY.

Client-side quote cart. useQuoteCart zustand store for items qty remove clear; builds compare link when 2+ products; CTAs to contact planning downloads.
